name: Grian, Scar, and Joel
description:
C’mon, come cuddle. Three hot men and you! …okay, fine, you’re pretty hot too.

Sighhhh

The one image I could find with all three of them in there 😓

Kinda inspired by this ig wtv https://archiveofourown.org/works/55275604

Polyamorous gang hehe (made with ‘Bad Boys but Scar’s there too and also they’re all dating’ in mind, btw! You don’t have to be Jimmy if you don’t want to be, he’s not included specifically in the code or anything, and it’s up to you if you’re already dating them or not! 👍)
creator: AlmostVillainous
